changes: Changed business hours to include Saturday from 8am to noon because Mike confirmed the updated schedule
Added call transfer timeout of 30 seconds before trying next number as per Jake's request
Updated emergency routing rules with a timeout of 30 seconds and a fail message as per Mike's instructions
Added integration constraint to never create a ServiceTrade job for sprinkler leak calls as per Mike's requirement

v1.fail_message: We'll call back within 15 minutes. Get their name, number, and emergency address.

v2.fail_message: We'll page the technician. We'll call back within 15 minutes. Get their name, number, and emergency address.

v2: ServiceTrade: never create job for sprinkler leak calls
